title: Vo1d's SMP Pack
description: This is a Vanilla Plus Modpack with the goal of creating a vanilla-feeling survival game, while adding many quality of life features and performance enhancing mods, to allow a smoother experience, while also having the capability for multiplayer.
body:
This is a Vanilla Plus Modpack with the goal of creating a vanilla-feeling survival game, while adding many quality of life features, such as removing the anvil repair limit, and performance enhancing mods to allow a smoother experience. It also has the capability for multiplayer, being purpose-built for a fun smp, with additions such as simple voice chat, custom music discs, and other fun add-ons for voice chat-enabled multiplayer. Please note that if you are intending to use this modpack for multiplayer purposes, a mic is required for the function of all voice chat features.


Extra Information
This Modpack Was Compiled By Mr_Shmear For a Collaborative SMP With Callm3vo1d.
You can find her on twitch and youtube as:
[Youtube - Vo1d](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCILPZDogx8Crrm8NL9SsVNA)
[Twitch - callm3vo1d](https://www.twitch.tv/callm3vo1d)
